title: Is there a way to have AI search for email address and add to specified column upon item creation?
excerpt: We use qualtrics to collect form data and it is emailed in to the board as a request. The form data is added to the item in monday as an update. Is there a way to have AI look for the email address that is in the form da…

posts.author: kswenson (KATIE SWENSON)
posts.cookedHtml: We use qualtrics to collect form data and it is emailed in to the board as a request. The form data is added to the item in monday as an update. Is there a way to have AI look for the email address that is in the form data and past it into the the “email” column of my board? I would use Forms in Monday, but they are far too messy for what I need. Qualtrics is much better for what I needed to do.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Qualtrics appears to have the ability to send a webhook when a survey is submitted. A tool like make.com would allow you to receive those webhooks and then create items in monday.com which contain specific information from the submission. While not a free solution, it might be a more efficient way of getting information to monday.com since you can fill in specific column values.
